author: jaso0n0818
title: Multi-language depth-first matcher miner (Solidity + Rust + Move + Cairo + Go)
notes: Resubmission of jaso0n0818-20260706-01, which was closed out-of-band before the automated round pipeline reached the executing/losing stage (no round-result artifacts were ever produced for it). Source is unchanged and re-verified against every static screening rule in kata/submissions.py and kata/screening.py (bundle size, forbidden env/provider tokens, sampling policy, benchmark-leak tokens, no-op detection, copycat checks) with no violations found. Extends the king's proven matcher-shaped depth-first design with per-language file discovery, allocation and prompting so CosmWasm/Rust, Move, and Cairo projects in the curated benchmark are no longer structurally invisible to a Solidity-only scanner, plus threaded concurrency and a higher finding ceiling to use more of the platform's recall budget.
